  "html": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n    <title>Lumina OS Terminal</title>\n    <script src=\"https://cdn.tailwindcss.com\"></script>\n    <style>\n        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=VT323&display=swap');\n\n        :root {\n            --phosphor-color: #39ff14;\n            --phosphor-dim: #1a800a;\n            --bg-color: #020a02;\n        }\n\n        body, html {\n            margin: 0;\n            padding: 0;\n            height: 100%;\n            background-color: var(--bg-color);\n            color: var(--phosphor-color);\n            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n\n        /* CRT Effects */\n        .crt::before {\n            content: \" \";\n            display: block;\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            bottom: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06));\n            z-index: 50;\n            background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%;\n            pointer-events: none;\n        }\n\n        .crt::after {\n            content: \" \";\n            display: block;\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            bottom: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,0,0,0) 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);\n            z-index: 51;\n            pointer-events: none;\n        }\n\n        .flicker {\n            animation: flicker 0.15s infinite;\n        }\n\n        @keyframes flicker {\n            0% { opacity: 0.95; }\n            50% { opacity: 0.9; }\n            100% { opacity: 0.95; }\n        }\n\n        /* Text Glow */\n        .glow {\n            text-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--phosphor-color), 0 0 10px var(--phosphor-dim);\n        }\n\n        /* Stylized Logo matching image */\n        .lumina-logo {\n            font-family: 'Arial Black', Impact, sans-serif; /* Needs thick font for stripes */\n            font-size: 6rem;\n            letter-spacing: 0.2em;\n            background: repeating-linear-gradient(\n                to bottom,\n                var(--phosphor-color),\n                var(--phosphor-color) 4px,\n                transparent 4px,\n                transparent 8px\n            );\n            -webkit-background-clip: text;\n            color: transparent;\n            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.6));\n            text-transform: uppercase;\n            line-height: 1;\n        }\n\n        .lumina-sub {\n            font-size: 2rem;\n            letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n            font-weight: bold;\n            margin-top: 1rem;\n        }\n\n        /* Terminal specifics */\n        #terminal-container {\n            height: 100vh;\n            display: flex;\n            flex-direction: column;\n            padding: 2rem;\n            box-sizing: border-box;\n            position: relative;\n            z-index: 10;\n        }\n\n        #output {\n            flex-grow: 1;\n            overflow-y: auto;\n            white-space: pre-wrap;\n            word-wrap: break-word;\n            margin-bottom: 1rem;\n            /* Hide scrollbar for cleaner look */\n            scrollbar-width: none; \n            -ms-overflow-style: none;\n        }\n        #output::-webkit-scrollbar { \n            display: none; \n        }\n\n        .input-line {\n            display: flex;\n            align-items: center;\n        }\n\n        .prompt {\n            margin-right: 0.5rem;\n        }\n\n        input[type=\"text\"] {\n            background: transparent;\n            border: none;\n            color: var(--phosphor-color);\n            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;\n            font-size: 1.5rem;\n            flex-grow: 1;\n            outline: none;\n            text-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--phosphor-color);\n            caret-color: transparent; /* Hide default caret */\n        }\n\n        /* Custom Blinking Cursor */\n        .cursor-wrapper {\n            position: relative;\n            flex-grow: 1;\n            display: flex;\n        }\n\n        #cmd-input {\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            width: 100%;\n            height: 100%;\n            opacity: 0; /* Hide actual input, use it just for capturing typing */\n            z-index: 20;\n        }\n\n        #display-input {\n            min-height: 1.5rem;\n            display: inline-block;\n        }\n\n        .cursor {\n            display: inline-block;\n            width: 10px;\n            height: 1.2rem;\n            background-color: var(--phosphor-color);\n            animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;\n            vertical-align: text-bottom;\n            margin-left: 2px;\n        }\n\n        @keyframes blink {\n            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }\n            50% { opacity: 0; }\n        }\n\n        /* Utility classes */\n        .hidden { display: none !important; }\n        .text-xl { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n        .text-sm { font-size: 1.2rem; }\n        \n        .system-msg { color: #aaffaa; }\n        .error-msg { color: #ff5555; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #ff0000; }\n        .highlight { color: #ffffff; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #ffffff; }\n\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body class=\"crt flicker\">\n\n    <!-- Splash Screen -->\n    <div id=\"splash\" class=\"absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-20 transition-opacity duration-1000 bg-[#020a02]\">\n        <div class=\"lumina-logo\">LUMINA</div>\n        <div class=\"lumina-sub glow\">LXT - LUMINA</div>\n        <div id=\"boot-text\" class=\"mt-8 text-xl glow h-8\"></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Terminal Interface -->\n    <div id=\"terminal-container\" class=\"hidden text-xl glow\">\n        <div id=\"output\"></div>\n        <div class=\"input-line\">\n            <span class=\"prompt\">LXT@LUMINA:~$</span>\n            <div class=\"cursor-wrapper\">\n                <span id=\"display-input\"></span><span class=\"cursor\"></span>\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"cmd-input\" autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\" autofocus>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <script>\n        const splash = document.getElementById('splash');\n        const terminal = document.getElementById('terminal-container');\n        const output = document.getElementById('output');\n        const input = document.getElementById('cmd-input');\n        const displayInput = document.getElementById('display-input');\n        const bootText = document.getElementById('boot-text');\n\n        // --- Boot Sequence ---\n        const bootMessages = [\n            \"INITIALIZING LUMINA CORE...\",\n            \"LOADING MODULES [OK]\",\n            \"ESTABLISHING SECURE CONNECTION...\",\n            \"BYPASSING FIREWALL [OK]\",\n            \"SYSTEM READY.\"\n        ];\n\n        async function runBootSequence() {\n            for (let i = 0; i < bootMessages.length; i++) {\n                bootText.innerText = bootMessages[i];\n                await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600 + Math.random() * 400));\n            }\n            \n            setTimeout(() => {\n                splash.style.opacity = '0';\n                setTimeout(() => {\n                    splash.classList.add('hidden');\n                    terminal.classList.remove('hidden');\n                    input.focus();\n                    printLine(\"LUMINA OS v2.4.1 [LXT Terminal]\");\n                    printLine(\"Type 'help' for a list of available commands.\\n\", \"system-msg\");\n                }, 1000);\n            }, 500);\n        }\n\n        window.onload = runBootSequence;\n\n        // --- Terminal Logic ---\n\n        // Sync hidden input with display span for custom cursor effect\n        input.addEventListener('input', () => {\n            displayInput.textContent = input.value;\n        });\n\n        // Keep focus on input when clicking anywhere\n        document.addEventListener('click', () => {\n            if (!splash.classList.contains('hidden') === false) {\n                input.focus();\n            }\n        });\n\n        input.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n                const cmd = this.value.trim();\n                this.value = '';\n                displayInput.textContent = '';\n                processCommand(cmd);\n            }\n        });\n\n        const fileSystem = {\n            \"readme.txt\": \"Welcome to the Lumina System.\\nThis environment is highly classified.\\nUnauthorized access will be logged and reported.\",\n            \"config.sys\": \"LOAD_MODULE=AI_CORE\\nMEM_ALLOC=8192M\\nNET_PROTOCOL=ENCRYPTED\",\n            \"logs\": \"<DIR>\"\n        };\n\n        const systemStatus = {\n            \"CPU\": \"98% (AI Processing)\",\n            \"MEM\": \"4096TB / 8192TB\",\n            \"NET\": \"SECURE UPLINK ACTIVE\",\n            \"CORE_TEMP\": \"34.2°C\"\n        };\n\n        async function processCommand(cmdString) {\n            if (!cmdString) {\n                printLine(`LXT@LUMINA:~$ `);\n                return;\n            }\n\n            printLine(`LXT@LUMINA:~$ ${cmdString}`, \"highlight\");\n            \n            const args = cmdString.split(' ').filter(Boolean);\n            const cmd = args[0].toLowerCase();\n\n            input.disabled = true; // Disable input while processing\n\n            switch (cmd) {\n                case 'help':\n                    await typeWriter(\"Available commands:\\n  help    - Show this message\\n  clear   - Clear terminal output\\n  date    - Display current system date\\n  status  - Display system diagnostics\\n  ls      - List directory contents\\n  cat     - Read file content (e.g., cat readme.txt)\\n  reboot  - Restart system\");\n                    break;\n                case 'clear':\n                    output.innerHTML = '';\n                    break;\n                case 'date':\n                    printLine(new Date().toString());\n                    break;\n                case 'status':\n                    let statusStr = \"--- SYSTEM DIAGNOSTICS ---\\n\";\n                    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(systemStatus)) {\n                        statusStr += `${key.padEnd(12)}: ${value}\\n`;\n                    }\n                    await typeWriter(statusStr);\n                    break;\n                case 'ls':\n                    let lsStr = \"\";\n                    for (const file in fileSystem) {\n                        lsStr += `${file}\\t`;\n                    }\n                    printLine(lsStr);\n                    break;\n                case 'cat':\n                    if (args.length > 1) {\n                        const filename = args[1];\n                        if (fileSystem[filename]) {\n                            if(fileSystem[filename] === \"<DIR>\") {\n                                printLine(`cat: ${filename}: Is a directory`, \"error-msg\");\n                            } else {\n                                await typeWriter(fileSystem[filename]);\n                            }\n                        } else {\n                            printLine(`cat: ${filename}: No such file or directory`, \"error-msg\");\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        printLine(\"Usage: cat <filename>\", \"error-msg\");\n                    }\n                    break;\n                case 'reboot':\n                    output.innerHTML = '';\n                    terminal.classList.add('hidden');\n                    splash.classList.remove('hidden');\n                    splash.style.opacity = '1';\n                    bootText.innerText = \"\";\n                    setTimeout(runBootSequence, 1000);\n                    break;\n                case 'sudo':\n                    await typeWriter(\"Nice try. This incident will be reported.\", \"error-msg\");\n                    break;\n                default:\n                    printLine(`Command not found: ${cmd}`, \"error-msg\");\n            }\n\n            input.disabled = false;\n            input.focus();\n            scrollToBottom();\n        }\n\n        function printLine(text, className = \"\") {\n            const div = document.createElement('div');\n            if (className) div.className = className;\n            div.textContent = text;\n            output.appendChild(div);\n            scrollToBottom();\n        }\n\n        async function typeWriter(text, className = \"\") {\n            const div = document.createElement('div');\n            if (className) div.className = className;\n            output.appendChild(div);\n            \n            // Simulate typing speed\n            for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i++) {\n                div.textContent += text.charAt(i);\n                scrollToBottom();\n                // Random delay for realistic effect, faster for spaces\n                let delay = text.charAt(i) === ' ' ? 5 : Math.random() * 20 + 10; \n                await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, delay));\n            }\n            // Add a newline at the end\n            const br = document.createElement('br');\n            output.appendChild(br);\n        }\n\n        function scrollToBottom() {\n            output.scrollTop = output.scrollHeight;\n        }\n\n    </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",
